sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_tuples (id Int32, values Tuple(Int32, Int32, Int32));
UPDATE test_tuples SET values = tupleIntDivByNumber(values, 5) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, tupleIntDivByNumber(values, 2) AS divided_values FROM test_tuples;
SELECT id FROM test_tuples WHERE tupleIntDivByNumber(values, 10) = (1, 2, 4);
